title: One-pager report
description: Data contract for the one-pager format: a single fixed A4/Letter sheet (no scroll, no TOC) for executive decision briefs, funding asks, go/no-go memos, and programme status snapshots. Zones tile a fixed CSS grid: masthead → BLUF lede → KPI strip → SCR spine + mini visual → ask box → mini risk list → sheet footer. The sample's #report-data is a valid instance of this schema.

meta.description: Shared report chrome (org / project / title / theme). Brand-neutral: use real or brand-neutral values (e.g. Independent Research / Open Research / Research Desk); never leave a {{...}} placeholder.

reportType.description: Kicker / eyebrow label shown in the masthead, e.g. 'Decision Brief'.

title.description: Report title shown in the masthead H1, e.g. 'Phase 2 Go / No-Go'.

subtitle.description: Optional subtitle appended to the masthead title.

author.description: Author / owner shown in the sheet footer (e.g. Research Desk).

theme.description: Initial brand theme; applied as <html data-theme>. Default for this format is 'plum'.

verdict.description: The one-word call shown as a large .verdict pill in the masthead top-right. Immediately signals the recommendation.

label.description: Verdict text shown in the pill, e.g. 'PROCEED — staged' or 'HOLD' or 'AT RISK'.

state.description: Semantic state that controls the pill colour: 'ok' = green/proceed, 'hold' = amber/caution, 'risk' = red/stop.

decideBy.description: Optional 'DECIDE BY' date shown as a chip next to the verdict, e.g. '2026-06-30'.

bluf.description: Bottom-line-up-front: one bold sentence stating the recommendation. Shown in the .lede band immediately below the masthead. Lead with the answer.

scr.description: The SCR reading spine — Situation / Complication / Resolution. Three stacked .scr-row blocks form the document's argument backbone.

situation.description: Step S — where we are today.

text.description: 1–3 sentence situation paragraph. Use inline bold/tnum markers for key numbers.

complication.description: Step C — why action is needed now (the problem or constraint).

text.description: 1–3 sentence complication paragraph. State urgency and stakes.

resolution.description: Step R — the plan / what is being proposed. Rendered with accent highlight as the active step.

text.description: 1–3 sentence resolution paragraph. The concrete path forward.

kpis.description: Exactly 4 KPI cells in the .kpi-strip — the four numbers that justify the verdict.

label.description: Small uppercase mono label above the number, e.g. 'Investment ask'.

value.description: The headline number shown large in tnum, e.g. '¥2.8'. May include HTML like '¥2.8<small>B</small>'.

unit.description: Optional unit appended inline to the value, e.g. 'B' or '%' or 'mo'. If provided, wrap in <small>.

delta.description: Optional delta / trend line shown below the number, e.g. '▲ ¥0.4B vs base'. Prefix with ▲ or ▼ for direction.

visual.description: The ONE CSS/SVG mini-exhibit beside the SCR spine. Either a bar chart or a 2×2 matrix — no charting library.

kind.description: Visual type: 'bars' = CSS bar chart (columns with percentage heights); 'matrix' = 2×2 quadrant matrix.

title.description: Small mono header above the visual, e.g. 'Roadmap coverage'.

subtitle.description: Optional one-line subtitle describing the axis or story, e.g. '% of FY26 roadmap funded — 58% → 92% with Phase 2'.

data.description: Data points for the visual. For 'bars': each item has {label, value (0-100), state?}. For 'matrix': each item has {label, x (0-1), y (0-1), state?}.

value.description: For bars: bar height as percentage (0–100).

legend.description: Optional legend entries for the visual, each with a label and swatch style.

swatchStyle.description: Swatch CSS class or key: 'brand' (navy), 'projected' (striped ok), 'base' (navy-line).

ask.description: The explicit decision requested — the call to action. Rendered as the full-width .ask-box with 2px brand top rule.

text.description: The decision-requested paragraph. 2–3 sentences; use bold for key actions.

metaItems.description: Optional key/value pairs shown in the ask-meta grid beside the ask text (owner, sponsor, amount, gate date, etc.).

risks.description: 2–4 residual risks in the .mini-risk list, each with a label, severity badge, and one-line mitigation.

label.description: Short risk name shown in the risk-label cell, e.g. 'Pilot misses target'.

severity.description: Severity rendered as a .st-badge: 'ok' = On track, 'hold' = Watch, 'risk' = High.

severityLabel.description: Badge text for the severity, e.g. 'Watch' or 'High' or 'On track'.

mitigation.description: One-line mitigation / action shown in risk-fix. Use bold for the key action.

examples.bluf: Recommendation: approve the ¥2.8B Phase 2 build, staged on a Q3 pilot gate — it clears the two workstreams now capping growth, returns a 5-yr NPV of ¥3.9B at 24% IRR, and caps pre-gate downside at ¥1.1B.

situation.text: Core platform is at 97% of plan and on budget, but the experience and integration workstreams sit amber — current run-rate closes only 58% of the FY26 roadmap. The addressable market is growing 14% YoY.

complication.text: Two competitors shipped the capability this quarter, and the primary vendor contract expires in September — renewing before Phase 2 scope is fixed forfeits leverage worth ~¥240M/yr. Compliance hardening trails at 41%.

resolution.text: Fund experience + integration to green, ring-fence a compliance squad, and renew the vendor on the hybrid option once scope locks. Release 40% now; the 60% balance gates on the Q3 pilot hitting its conversion target.

visual.title: Roadmap coverage
visual.subtitle: % of FY26 roadmap funded — 58% → 92% with Phase 2

ask.text: Approve the ¥2.8B staged Phase 2 investment (40% now / 60% on the Q3 pilot gate) and authorise the hybrid vendor renewal before the September expiry. Full evidence: long-form Open Research Investment Business Case.

risks.label: Pilot misses target
risks.mitigation: Stage-gate caps exposure to ¥1.1B; 60% balance held until Q3 conversion confirmed.

risks.label: Vendor renewal slips
risks.mitigation: Lock hybrid term by Aug; legal pre-cleared, fallback supplier shortlisted.

risks.label: Compliance hardening lag
risks.mitigation: Ring-fenced squad brings 41% → 100% before pilot; weekly burn-down to CRO.
